title: Gackle bat

The '''gackle bat''' was a nocturnal flying predator native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. Their primary food source were [[Stintaril/Legends|stintarils]] which they killed by injecting a muscle relaxant with their fangs.<ref name="SWG:GB" />

Gackle bat were also found on [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> It was said that [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]'s [[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|''Inferno'']] resembled a gackle bat.<ref name="TNEGtVaV">''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''</ref>

The '''gackle stalker''' was a mutant subspecies of the gackle bat.<ref name="TCSWE" />

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Cult of Exar Kun|Exar Kun cultists]] tamed a number of gackle bats, including one named [[Vin'Rith]], that they used to defend the [[Temple of Exar Kun]].<ref name="SWG:EK">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=heroic|Exar Kun}}</ref>
